Class InfluenzaHandlingLogic

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.DiseaseResultFunctionality
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.logic.InfluenzaHandlingLogic
public class InfluenzaHandlingLogic extends DiseaseResultFunctionality
Logic that is influenza only related. Currently, this class is not needed since the same methods as in the covid-19 context are used, but this might be in the future.
